description: Quarterly snapshots of Nifty 50 + Nifty Midcap 150 constituents. POC uses today's universe as default. Phase B should populate historical quarters from NSE archives to fix survivorship bias.

2026-Q2.note: Starter: mirrors backtest/data/universe.json. Replace with actual NSE quarterly list when available.

phase_b_todo: Populate 2023-Q1 through 2026-Q1 from NSE index reconstitution archives (or scrape from nsearchives.nseindia.com/content/indices/...).
